overview: AgriConnect is a full-stack agricultural marketplace on the Internet Computer connecting Farmers, Business buyers, and Admins. Farmers list crops with images and manage orders, Businesses browse and purchase produce, and Admins oversee the entire platform with approval workflows and reports.
features: Role-based marketplace with Farmer, Business, and Admin panels
Crop listings with image upload, pricing, and location
Polling-based chat between farmers and buyers
Admin crop approval, user management, and reports dashboard
Responsive mobile-first design with green/white theme and smooth animations
Internet Identity authentication with role-based access control
